channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: FDA Approves Foundayo, the First Oral GLP-1 Obesity Pill
item.description:
The FDA has approved Foundayo (orforglipron), a first-of-its-kind oral GLP-1 receptor agonist for obesity — no injection required, no fasting window before taking it.

Key points:
• Made by Eli Lilly, Foundayo is a once-daily small-molecule pill that can be taken at any time of day with no food or water restrictions — unlike rival oral GLP-1s.
• In Phase 3 trials, patients on the highest dose lost an average of 12% of their body weight (roughly 27 lbs) over 72 weeks, with added improvements in blood pressure, cholesterol, and waist circumference.
• Pricing starts at $25/month for commercially insured patients with a Lilly savings card, and $149/month for self-pay — with Medicare Part D coverage expected by July 1, 2026.
• Foundayo is the first drug approved under the FDA's new National Priority Voucher Program, making it the fastest approval of a new molecular entity since 2002.

Read the full article: FDA Approves Foundayo, the First Oral GLP-1 Obesity Pill

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
